intro: Honest, factual comparisons of lazysite with other ways to build a site - what each is best suited for, side by side. Pick the one closest to what you use today.

comparisons.subject: WordPress
comparisons.what: The default CMS - a database, an admin UI and a vast plugin ecosystem.

comparisons.subject: Hugo
comparisons.what: A fast static-site generator with a build step and Go templates.

comparisons.subject: Ghost
comparisons.what: A modern publishing platform with memberships and newsletters.
